name: Peanut Butter Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread about 1/2 teaspoon of peanut butter on each wafer cookie.
2. Place the coated wafers on a foil-lined baking sheet.
3. Top each wafer with four miniature marshmallows.
4. Broil for 2-3 minutes, or until the marshmallows are lightly browned.
5. Serve warm.
